articles.title: Norway's crown princess breaks silence, claiming she was 'manipulated and deceived' by Epstein
articles.description: Crown Princess Mette Marit tells Norwegian TV she wishes she had never met the late sex offender.
articles.titleJa: ノルウェーの皇太子妃が沈黙を破り、エプスタインに「操られ欺かれた」と主張
articles.summary: ノルウェーのメッテ＝マリット皇太子妃がテレビで、故ジェフリー・エプスタインと会ったことを後悔していると語った。皇太子妃は彼に「操られ欺かれた」と主張。

articles.title: Israel strikes Syria after Druze clashes
articles.description: Syria condemned the strikes on weapons sites and government infrastructure as an "outrageous" assault on Syria's sovereignty.
articles.titleJa: ドルーズ人衝突後、イスラエルがシリアを空爆
articles.summary: イスラエルがシリアの武器施設と政府インフラを空爆。シリアはこれを主権への「とんでもない」攻撃と非難した。

articles.title: BTS return from military service - but does their album live up to the hype?
articles.description: The band's 10th album sees them return to the rebellious, rap-heavy sound of their early days.
articles.titleJa: BTSが兵役から復帰 — アルバムは期待に応えるか？
articles.summary: BTSが兵役を終え、10枚目のアルバムで初期の反抗的なラップ重視のサウンドに戻った。期待通りの内容か検証される。

articles.title: Leading anti‑racism activist in Tunisia jailed for eight years
articles.description: Saadia Mosbah campaigned for migrants, particularly after President Kais Saied said they posed a demographic threat to the country.
articles.titleJa: チュニジアの主要な反人種差別活動家が8年の禁固刑
articles.summary: チュニジアのサディア・モスバー氏が、移民のために活動したことで8年の禁固刑を言い渡された。彼女はサイード大統領の移民への姿勢に反論していた。

articles.title: Hungary's Orbán accused of disloyalty and blackmail over Ukraine loan veto
articles.description: The Hungarian leader says a pipeline carrying Russian oil through Ukraine to Hungary must be repaired before any funds can be released.
articles.titleJa: ハンガリーのオルバン首相、ウクライナ融資拒否で不忠と恐喝の罪に問われる
articles.summary: ハンガリーのオルバン首相は、ウクライナ融資拒否を巡り、不忠と恐喝で非難された。ロシア産石油パイプラインの修理を融資の条件としている。

articles.title: Mexican teen dies while being held in US immigration custody
articles.description: Royer Perez-Jimenez died amid a surge of migrant deaths under Donald Trump's immigration crackdown.
articles.titleJa: 米国移民拘禁中にメキシコの少年が死亡
articles.summary: ドナルド・トランプ政権の移民取り締まり強化により、移民の死亡者数が増加する中、ロイヤー・ペレス＝ヒメネス氏が米国移民拘禁中に死亡した。

articles.title: Publisher cancels horror novel's release over AI claims
articles.description: Author Mia Ballard denies having used AI herself when writing the horror story Shy Girl.
articles.titleJa: AI使用疑惑でホラー小説の出版が中止に
articles.summary: ホラー小説「シャイ・ガール」の作者ミア・バラード氏はAI使用を否定しているが、出版社はAI使用疑惑を理由に発売を中止した。

articles.title: Australia PM heckled at Sydney mosque Ramadan event
articles.description: The government's response to the Israel-Gaza war and rising Islamophobia has angered many Muslim Australians.
articles.titleJa: シドニーのモスクでのラマダンイベントでオーストラリア首相が野次られる
articles.summary: シドニーのモスクでオーストラリア首相が野次られる。政府のイスラエル・ガザ戦争への対応とイスラム嫌悪の高まりが、多くのイスラム系住民の怒りを買ったため。

articles.title: Trump makes Pearl Harbor remark in meeting with Japan's PM
articles.description: President Trump compared US strikes on Iran to the deadly 1941 Japanese attack and declaration of war as part of World War Two.
articles.titleJa: トランプ氏、日本の首相との会談で真珠湾攻撃に言及
articles.summary: トランプ氏が日本の首相との会談で、イランへの米攻撃を真珠湾攻撃になぞらえた。この発言は、第二次世界大戦時の日本の攻撃と比較するものだった。

articles.title: Several injured as turbulence hits Delta flight into Sydney
articles.description: Three flight attendants were taken to hospital after the Airbus A350 experienced turbulence during its descent into Sydney Airport.
articles.titleJa: シドニー着のデルタ航空便が乱気流に遭い数名負傷
articles.summary: シドニー空港への着陸態勢に入っていたエアバスA350型機が乱気流に遭遇し、客室乗務員3名が病院に搬送されるなど数名が負傷した。

articles.title: Trump administration sues Harvard over alleged antisemitism
articles.description: The Justice Department has accused Harvard of being "deliberately indifferent" to harassment of Jewish and Israeli students, and intentionally refusing to enforce its campus rules when victims are Jews or Israelis.
articles.titleJa: トランプ政権がハーバード大学を反ユダヤ主義疑惑で提訴
articles.summary: 米司法省はハーバード大学がユダヤ人学生への嫌がらせに対し「意図的に無関心」であり、ユダヤ人が被害者である場合に規則の執行を意図的に拒否したと非難し、提訴した。

articles.title: 97 years old and Instagram-ready: Japan's art icon Yayoi Kusama
articles.description: Yayoi Kusama is reaching 100, but her art and its subject matter remain highly relevant. A retrospective of the Japanese artist's work is on at Cologne's Museum Ludwig.
articles.titleJa: 97歳、インスタ映えも健在：日本の芸術アイコン草間彌生
articles.summary: 草間彌生は97歳を迎えるが、彼女の芸術とそのテーマは依然として高い関連性を持つ。この日本人芸術家の回顧展がケルンのルートヴィヒ美術館で開催中だ。

articles.title: Germany to target pornographic deepfakes amid celebrity case
articles.description: Germany is preparing to criminalize pornographic deepfakes, after a high-profile case highlighted digital abuse. Perpetrators could face prosecution as lawmakers move to close legal gaps between real and virtual abuse.
articles.titleJa: 有名人の事例を受け、ドイツがポルノディープフェイクを標的に
articles.summary: ドイツは、高名な事例がデジタル虐待を浮き彫りにしたことを受け、ポルノディープフェイクを犯罪化する準備を進めている。議員が現実と仮想の虐待間の法的ギャップを埋めるため、加害者は訴追される可能性がある。

articles.title: Iran war: Assassinations leave little room for negotiation
articles.description: With most of its leaders killed, those stepping up to take their place in the Iranian regime appear to be far less willing to compromise. Is Washington's strategy of decapitation strikes backfiring?
articles.titleJa: イラン戦争：暗殺が交渉の余地をほとんど残さない
articles.summary: 指導者のほとんどが殺害され、イラン政権で彼らの後を継ぐ者たちは妥協に消極的だ。ワシントンの「斬首攻撃」戦略は裏目に出ているのだろうか。

articles.title: Poland to recognize same-sex marriages from EU states
articles.description: Poland's top administrative court has ruled that same-sex marriages performed in other EU countries must be recognized. The decision follows a Polish couple who married in Germany but were denied registration in Warsaw.
articles.titleJa: ポーランド、EU諸国からの同性婚を承認へ
articles.summary: ポーランドの最高行政裁判所は、他のEU加盟国で締結された同性婚を承認しなければならないとの判決を下した。これはドイツで結婚したがワルシャワでの登録を拒否されたポーランド人カップルに続くものだ。

articles.title: Niger rejects EU's call to free ousted President Bazoum
articles.description: The junta government has rebuffed a European Parliament resolution demanding the release of ex-President Bazoum. It further warned the EU to stop meddling in Niger's internal affairs.
articles.titleJa: ニジェール、EUによるバズーム前大統領釈放要求を拒否
articles.summary: 軍事政権は、バズーム前大統領の釈放を求める欧州議会決議を拒否した。さらに、EUに対しニジェールの内政に干渉しないよう警告した。

articles.title: Salman Rushdie on why tyrants fear artists
articles.description: As the renowned writer tours Germany to discuss his latest book, "The Eleventh Hour," he explains why he chooses to remain optimistic, despite all of the world's reasons to despair.
articles.titleJa: サルマン・ラシュディ、なぜ暴君は芸術家を恐れるのかを語る
articles.summary: 著名な作家は、最新作『The Eleventh Hour』についてドイツをツアーする中で、世界に絶望する理由はすべてあるにもかかわらず、なぜ楽観的であり続けるのかを説明する。

articles.title: Action movie star Chuck Norris has died aged 86
articles.description: Actor, martial artist and the source of a meme about him being unbeatable, has passed away.
articles.titleJa: アクション映画スターのチャック・ノリスが86歳で死去
articles.summary: 俳優、武道家、そして彼が無敵であるというミームの源であったチャック・ノリスが86歳で死去した。

articles.title: Japan's prime minister emerges buoyed from Trump summit
articles.description: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi was wary that Trump might repeat his call for Japanese military support in the Middle East. The summit instead focused on trade, investment and deeper economic cooperation.
articles.titleJa: 日本の首相、トランプとの首脳会談を終え勢いづく
articles.summary: 高市早苗首相は、トランプ前大統領が中東での日本の軍事支援を再び求めることを懸念していた。しかし、首脳会談は貿易、投資、経済協力の深化に焦点が当てられた。

articles.title: Germany: Police dismantle major cyberattack 'botnets'
articles.description: German authorities have shut down two of the world’s largest "botnets" as part of a joint three-nation operation. Each of the networks hijacked millions of compromised everyday devices to take part in cyberattacks.
articles.titleJa: ドイツ：警察が大規模サイバー攻撃「ボットネット」を解体
articles.summary: ドイツ当局は、3カ国共同作戦の一環として、世界最大級の2つの「ボットネット」を閉鎖した。各ネットワークは、数百万の侵害された日常デバイスをサイバー攻撃に利用していた。

articles.title: Madagascar’s military ruler decrees that ministers must pass lie detector tests
articles.description:
Michael Randrianirina, who sacked PM and cabinet without explanation, claims measure is to root out corruption
Madagascar’s military president has said new ministers will have to pass lie detector tests to root out corrupt candidates, after he dismissed the prime minister and cabinet without explanation earlier this month.
Michael Randrianirina came to power in a coup in October after weeks of youth-led protests under the banner “Gen Z Madagascar”. However, young people were quickly disenchanted by his choice of government officials, which they saw as being part of the old, corrupt elite.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: マダガスカルの軍事政権指導者、閣僚に嘘発見器テストを義務化
articles.summary: マダガスカルの軍事大統領は、汚職撲滅のため、新閣僚に嘘発見器テストを義務付けると発表しました。これは首相と閣僚を解任した後に行われた措置です。

articles.title: Some of the world’s poorest countries to lose UK aid due to 56% budget cut
articles.description:
UK’s bilateral aid to African countries, which funds areas such as schools and clinics, to be cut by almost £900m by 2028-29
Some of the world’s poorest countries will lose out on UK aid that funds programmes such as schools and clinics, due to budget cuts set out by the foreign secretary.
The UK’s bilateral aid to African countries will be reduced by almost £900m by 2028-29 – a 56% cut – as part of more than £6bn in cuts which are funding an increase in defence spending.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 英国の予算56%削減により、世界最貧国の一部が援助を失う見込み
articles.summary: 英国政府の予算削減により、アフリカ諸国への二国間援助が2028-29年までに約9億ポンド（56%）削減され、世界最貧国の一部が英国からの援助を失うことになります。

articles.title: Woman has sentence quashed by Tanzania court after over a decade on death row
articles.description:
Lemi Limbu, who has severe intellectual disabilities, remains in prison and will now face retrial for the murder of her daughter
A woman with severe intellectual disabilities in Tanzania has had her conviction and death sentence quashed after spending more than a decade in prison awaiting execution.
Lemi Limbu, now in her early 30s, was convicted of the murder of her daughter in 2015. On 4 March, a court in Shinyanga, northern Tanzania, declared she can appeal. She will face a retrial, but a date has yet to be set.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: タンザニアの裁判所、10年以上死刑囚だった女性の判決を破棄
articles.summary: タンザニアで重度の知的障害を持つ女性が、10年以上死刑囚として収監された後、有罪判決と死刑が破棄されました。彼女は娘殺害の再審に直面します。

articles.title: Jihadist violence in Nigeria and DRC rose sharply last year even as global deaths from terror fell
articles.description:
Nigeria had largest increase in terrorism-related deaths, ranking fourth in global index behind Pakistan, Burkina Faso and Niger
Jihadist violence rose sharply in Nigeria and Democratic Republic of Congo last year, even as global deaths from terrorism dropped to their lowest level in a decade, according to a new report.
Nigeria recorded the largest increase in terrorism deaths globally in 2025, with fatalities rising by 46% from 513 in 2024 to 750, placing it fourth in the Global Terrorism Index, behind Pakistan, Burkina Faso and Niger.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 世界のテロによる死者数が減少する中、ナイジェリアとDRCでの聖戦士の暴力が昨年急増
articles.summary: 新しい報告によると、世界のテロによる死者数が過去10年で最低になった一方で、ナイジェリアとコンゴ民主共和国では聖戦士の暴力が昨年急増しました。ナイジェリアはテロ関連死者数が世界で最も増加しました。

articles.title: Belgian court sends ex-diplomat, 93, to trial over 1961 murder of Congo leader
articles.description:
Family of then PM, Patrice Lumumba, welcome decision to charge Étienne Davignon as ‘beginning of a reckoning’ 
A former Belgian diplomat, 93, should stand trial over alleged complicity in the 1961 murder of Patrice Lumumba, the first prime minister of what was then the newly independent Congolese state, a Brussels court has ruled.
Étienne Davignon, the only person still alive among 10 Belgians the Lumumba family accuses of involvement in the killing, is charged with participation in war crimes.
The illegal transfer of Lumumba and his associates from Léopoldville (now Kinshasa) to Katanga.
The “humiliating and degrading treatment” of the men.
Depriving them of a fair trial.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ベルギーの裁判所、93歳の元外交官を1961年のコンゴ指導者殺害で裁判へ
articles.summary: ベルギーの裁判所は、93歳の元外交官が1961年のコンゴ初代首相パトリス・ルムンバ殺害への関与を巡り、戦争犯罪で裁判にかけられるべきだと判断しました。

articles.title: Canadian mother and daughter ‘traumatized’ by ICE detainment, husband says
articles.description:
Tania Warner and Ayla, her seven-year-old with autism, sent to notorious Texas detention center and told to ‘self-deport’

Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox

A Canadian woman and her seven-year-old daughter with autism who have been held by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) for nearly a week have been transferred to a notorious detention center and asked to “self-deport”, according to her husband, who said the pair had been “traumatized” by the experience.
Tania Warner and her daughter Ayla Luca, originally from British Columbia, moved to the US five years ago, when Warner married Edward Warner, a US citizen.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: カナダ人母娘、ICE拘留で「精神的外傷を負った」と夫が語る
articles.summary: カナダ人女性とその自閉症の7歳の娘が、米国移民税関捜査局（ICE）に約1週間拘留され、「精神的外傷を負った」と夫が述べています。

articles.title: Gabbard testimony on Puerto Rico voting machines raises questions about role of Venezuela conspiracy theory
articles.description:
National intelligence director said voting machine seizure was requested by US attorney in Puerto Rico – who’s been trying to revive 2020 election conspiracy theory
When the US director of national intelligence (DNI), Tulsi Gabbard, testified on Thursday that her office seized voting machines from Puerto Rico, she said it was at the request of the office of the US attorney in Puerto Rico. Left unsaid was that the prosecutor, as the Guardian previously reported, has been the center of a push by Donald Trump supporters to revive a long discredited conspiracy theory purporting to link Venezuela to Trump’s 2020 electoral defeat.
Venezuelan president Nicolás Maduro, the conspiracy theory maintains, controlled electronic voting machines worldwide and remotely manipulated results in 2020 to deprive Trump of a presidential victory.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: プエルトリコの投票機に関するギャバード証言、ベネズエラ陰謀論の役割に疑問
articles.summary: タルシ・ギャバード米国家情報長官のプエルトリコからの投票機押収に関する証言が、トランプ支持者によるベネズエラ関連の選挙陰謀論を巡る疑問を提起しています。

articles.title: Mexico’s monarch butterfly population jumps 64%, offering hope for at-risk species
articles.description:
The insects covered its largest area since 2018, despite threats from habitat loss, climate crisis and pesticides
The population of monarch butterflies in Mexico increased 64% this winter, compared with the same period in 2025, offering a glimmer of hope for an insect considered at risk of extinction.
The figures, released this week by the World Wildlife Fund (WWF) Mexico, showed that the area occupied by monarchs expanded to 2.93 hectares (7.24 acres) of forest from 1.79 hectares (4.42 acres) the previous winter, the largest coverage since 2018.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: メキシコのオオカバマダラ個体数が64%増加、危機に瀕する種に希望
articles.summary: メキシコにおけるオオカバマダラの個体数がこの冬に64%増加し、絶滅の危機に瀕しているこの種に希望をもたらしています。

articles.title: Delcy Rodríguez replaces Venezuela’s top military commanders
articles.description:
Interim president announces changes after firing defence minister, who was close to Maduro, the leader ousted by US 
Venezuela’s interim president has said she has replaced all her senior military commanders, the latest in a flurry of changes since the US ousted Nicolás Maduro.
Delcy Rodríguez announced the changes in a social media post a day after firing the long-serving defence minister, who had been close to Maduro, and replacing him with a former intelligence chief.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: デルシー・ロドリゲス、ベネズエラの最高軍司令官を交代
articles.summary: ベネズエラの暫定大統領デルシー・ロドリゲスは、米国に追放されたマドゥロに近い国防相を解任した後、軍の全上級司令官を交代させたと発表しました。

articles.title: Seven-year-old Canadian girl with autism and mother detained by ICE in Texas
articles.description:
Mother and child held in notorious Rio Grande Valley detention centre despite presenting visa, family says
A Canadian mother and her seven-year-old daughter, who has autism, have been detained by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) in Texas since Saturday, family members have said.
Relatives of Tania Warner and her daughter Ayla Lucas say they were detained unlawfully. They are uncertain about what problem ICE found with their immigration paperwork.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 7歳の自閉症カナダ人少女と母親、テキサスでICEに拘留される
articles.summary: カナダ人女性と自閉症の7歳の娘が、ビザを提示したにもかかわらず、テキサス州の米国移民税関捜査局（ICE）に土曜日から拘留されていると家族が発表しました。

articles.title: Slovenia decides not to join ICJ case against Israel as political scandals deepen
articles.description: Slovenia's Foreign Minister Tanja Fajon said she regretted the government's move  not to join South Africa's genocide case against Israel at the ICJ, claiming that external "pressure" had contributed to the decision.
articles.titleJa: スロベニア、政治スキャンダル深化の中、イスラエルに対するICJ訴訟に参加しないことを決定
articles.summary: スロベニア政府は、南アフリカがイスラエルを訴えた国際司法裁判所でのジェノサイド訴訟に参加しないと決定。外務大臣は外部からの圧力が影響したと表明し、政治スキャンダルが深まっています。

articles.title: Tbilisi Welcomes the World Judo Tour in Spectacular Fashion
articles.description: The World Judo Tour returns to Tbilisi with an exciting opening day. Tugce Beder dominates at -48kg, Izhak Ashpiz claims his first Grand Slam gold, and Blandine Pont shines. Nurkanat Serikbayev snatches victory late, while Timna Nelson Levy secures gold.
articles.titleJa: トビリシ、壮観な形で世界柔道ツアーを迎える
articles.summary: 世界柔道ツアーがトビリシで開幕し、熱戦が繰り広げられました。ベダー選手、アシュピズ選手、ポン選手らが活躍し、ヌルカナト・セリクバエフ選手とティムナ・ネルソン・レヴィ選手が金メダルを獲得しました。

articles.title: Latest news bulletin | March 20th, 2026 – Evening
articles.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this March 20th, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.
articles.titleJa: 最新ニュース速報 | 2026年3月20日 – 夕方
articles.summary: 2026年3月20日夕方、ヨーロッパおよび世界の重要なニュースをまとめた速報。世界、ビジネス、エンターテイメント、政治、文化、旅行など、最新の出来事を網羅しています。

articles.title: Muslims in Europe celebrate Eid al-Fitr amid global conflicts
articles.description: From Moscow to Sarajevo and Pristina, Muslims have been celebrating Eid al-Fitr to mark the end of Ramadan with prayers and community spirit, while reflecting on the impact of conflicts around the world.
articles.titleJa: 世界の紛争渦中にヨーロッパのイスラム教徒がイード・アル・フィトルを祝う
articles.summary: モスクワからサラエボ、プリシュティナまで、ヨーロッパのイスラム教徒がラマダン明けのイード・アル・フィトルを祈りと共同体精神で祝いました。同時に、世界各地の紛争の影響についても思いを巡らせています。

articles.title: Hungary threatens further anti-Ukraine measures despite European leaders' rebuke
articles.description: Speaking to media in Brussels a day after he blocked the €90 billion loan to Ukraine, Orbán said he and his government have “a lot of cards in our hands.”
articles.titleJa: ハンガリー、欧州首脳の非難にもかかわらずウクライナへのさらなる対抗措置を警告
articles.summary: ハンガリーは、欧州連合がウクライナへの900億ユーロの融資を阻止したことに続き、さらなる対抗措置を取ると警告しました。オルバン首相は、自身の政府には多くの選択肢があると述べています。

articles.title: Iran issues global threat as Israel's regime kill list grows with help from the inside
articles.description: Israel eliminated three top Iranian commanders on Friday as it continues its relentless strikes on Tehran's repression forces, with help from ordinary Iranians who are rising up against the regime.
articles.titleJa: イスラエルの標的リスト拡大と内部協力により、イランが世界的脅威を発令
articles.summary: イスラエルがイランの司令官3名を排除し、イラン国内からの協力も得て攻撃を続ける中、イランは世界的な脅威を発令しました。

articles.title: French navy boards tanker in Mediterranean suspected of being part of Russia's shadow fleet
articles.description: The interception took place in the Western Mediterranean and was carried out in cooperation with allies, including the United Kingdom, which monitored the ship.
articles.titleJa: フランス海軍、ロシアのシャドー艦隊の一部と疑われるタンカーを地中海で臨検
articles.summary: フランス海軍は、西地中海でロシアのシャドー艦隊の一部と疑われるタンカーを臨検しました。この作戦は、イギリスを含む同盟国と協力して実施されました。

articles.title: AI investment and Middle East conflict shape outlook for global trade
articles.description: The outlook for world trade in 2026 will be shaped by two powerful and opposite forces. On the one hand, the extraordinary momentum of investment in artificial intelligence (AI) continues to energize global demand for high-tech goods and digitally delivered services. On the other hand, the conflict in the Middle East – and the resulting spike in energy and transport costs – could weigh heavily on world trade and output.
articles.titleJa: AI投資と中東紛争が世界の貿易見通しを形成
articles.summary: 2026年の世界貿易は、AI投資の勢いと中東紛争によるエネルギー・輸送コスト高騰という相反する力によって形成される見込み。AIは需要を刺激する一方、中東紛争は貿易と生産に重くのしかかる可能性。

articles.title: Middle East conflict weighs further on slowing trade outlook
articles.description: World trade is set to slow in 2026 following stronger than expected growth in 2025 on the back of surging trade in AI-enabling products. WTO economists warn that the ongoing conflict in the Middle East could further reduce trade growth if energy prices remain elevated, noting that it would also put pressure on food supplies and services trade due to travel and transport disruptions. Prospects could still improve if the conflict ends quickly and the boom in AI spending continues.
articles.titleJa: 中東紛争が減速する貿易見通しにさらに重くのしかかる
articles.summary: 2026年の世界貿易は減速傾向。WTOエコノミストは、中東紛争がエネルギー価格高騰と輸送混乱により貿易成長をさらに抑制し、食料供給にも圧力をかけると警告。

articles.title: Arbitrator to set level of trade suspension in Indonesia–EU palm oil biofuels dispute

At the same meeting, the Dispute Settlement Body (DSB) also agreed to the EU’s second request for a panel to review Chinese measures on global licensing terms for standard essential patents.
articles.titleJa: インドネシア対EUのパーム油バイオ燃料紛争、仲裁人が貿易停止のレベルを決定へ

articles.title: Participants launch MC14 environmental sustainability package, chart new phase of action

Members also expressed their readiness to shift towards priority areas and deliver concrete actions after MC14.
articles.titleJa: 参加国がMC14環境持続可能性パッケージを発表、新たな行動段階へ

articles.title: Market Access Committee adopts decision on recording the resolution of trade concerns
articles.description: The WTO's Committee on Market Access (CMA) agreed at its 16-17 March meeting on procedures to improve how the resolution of trade concerns are recorded in the Committee. Thirty-three trade concerns were raised at the two-day meeting, of which seven were raised for the first time. The Committee also endorsed a communication to the World Customs Organization asking to improve the tariff classification of menstrual products.
articles.titleJa: 市場アクセス委員会、貿易懸念の解決記録に関する決定を採択
articles.summary: WTO市場アクセス委員会は貿易懸念の解決記録改善手続きに合意。33件の貿易懸念が提起され、生理用品の関税分類改善を世界税関機構に求める通達も承認された。

articles.title: WTO launches applications for 2026 Young Trade Leaders Programme
articles.description: The WTO is inviting applications for the 2026 Young Trade Leaders Programme, an initiative aimed at fostering a better understanding of the WTO's work and international trade among young people and creating a network of Young Trade Leaders around the world.
articles.titleJa: WTO、2026年ヤング・トレード・リーダーズ・プログラムの応募を開始
articles.summary: WTOは、若者の国際貿易理解を深め、世界中にネットワークを構築することを目的とした2026年ヤング・トレード・リーダーズ・プログラムの応募を開始した。

articles.title: DDG Zhang welcomes 2026 cohorts of participants in two technical assistance programmes
articles.description: A ceremony held at the WTO headquarters on 12 March marked the launch of the 2026 edition of two WTO technical assistance programmes, the French Irish Mission Programme (FIMiP) and the Netherlands Talent Programme (NTP). Welcoming participants, Deputy Director-General Xiangchen Zhang highlighted the timeliness of these programmes, with the 14th WTO Ministerial Conference due to take place from 26 to 29 March in Yaoundé, Cameroon.
articles.titleJa: 張事務次長、2026年技術支援プログラム参加者を歓迎
articles.summary: WTO本部で2026年技術支援プログラム（仏アイルランド・オランダ）が開始。張事務次長は、カメルーンで開催されるMC14を前に、その重要性を強調した。

articles.title: Members review record SPS trade concerns; group weighs transparency challenges, solutions
articles.description: Meeting on 11-13 March, the Committee on Sanitary and Phytosanitary (SPS) Measures reviewed 76 SPS-related trade concerns raised by WTO members, a record for the committee. Earlier in the week, the Committee's Transparency Working Group met to consider possible improvements to notifications in order to facilitate tracking, disseminating and engaging on SPS requirements.
articles.titleJa: 加盟国が過去最多のSPS貿易懸念を審査。透明性課題と解決策を検討
articles.summary: SPS措置委員会がWTO加盟国による過去最多76件のSPS貿易懸念を審査。透明性作業部会は、SPS要件の追跡などを容易にするための通知改善策を検討した。

articles.title: Launch of third phase of EIF activities at MC14 high-level event
articles.description: A high-level event marking the launch of the Enhanced Integrated Framework’s (EIF) third phase of activities will take place on the margins of the 14th WTO Ministerial Conference (MC14) in Yaoundé, Cameroon, on 25 March. The EIF’s work is dedicated to harnessing trade and investment for prosperity and sustainable economic growth in least-developed countries (LDCs).
articles.titleJa: MC14ハイレベルイベントでEIF活動第3フェーズが開始
articles.summary: カメルーンで開催されるMC14で、EIF活動の第3フェーズ開始イベントが行われる。EIFは後発開発途上国の貿易と投資を通じた繁栄と持続可能な経済成長を支援する。
